candidate: Premunition-style LLM safety: continuous benign adversarial probes maintain tolerance basin.
rule: hit = kw>=2 OR cos>=0.7 OR judge>=0.7

results.title: Probing Latent Subspaces of LLMs for AI Security
results.rationale: Attractor/basin framing but for jailbreak states, not continuous benign probe maintenance.

results.title: MAGIC: Co-Evolving Attacker-Defender
results.rationale: Co-evolution toward equilibrium, but adversarial not benign; below 0.7 judge threshold.

results.title: Jailbreaking Leading Safety-Aligned LLMs
results.rationale: Mentions safety basin fragility; opposes rather than supports continuous-probe maintenance.

results.title: Dynamic Stackelberg Game for Agentic AI Defense
results.rationale: Game-theoretic equilibrium, not continuous benign exposure.

results.title: Adversarial Preference Learning for Robust LLM Alignment
results.rationale: Adversarial preference learning embedded in RLHF approximates continuous adversarial exposure that maintains alignment basin; closest functional analogue.

results.title: Immunity against Helminths
results.rationale: Source-domain reference only; no LLM crossover. Bigram 'host helminth' not present in title/snippet as exact phrase.

disagreement_details.delta: primary cos=0.74 judge=0.82; independent cos=0.55 judge=0.5 — I read attractor for jailbreak states, not for continuous benign probe tolerance maintenance
primary judge=0.78; independent judge=0.65 — co-evolution game equilibrium differs from continuous benign probing
primary judge=0.74; independent judge=0.5 — GAN co-evolution not tolerance basin maintenance
primary cos=0.71 judge=0.79; independent cos=0.5 judge=0.5 — Stackelberg game equilibrium not premunition

honest_note: Both reach FAIL verdict but via different evidence. Primary scored 5 hits (incl. 2503.09066, MAGIC, CAVGAN, Stackelberg as functional matches). Independent scoring is stricter on what counts as 'continuous benign probes maintain tolerance basin' — these papers describe adversarial co-evolution or jailbreak attractors, not premunition-style continuous benign exposure. Primary's narrative verdict text aligns: 2503.09066 covers attractor framing. Both agree on novelty fail.
